name: 5" Glass Salt and Pepper Grinder Set Sage Green - Figmint™
description:
Enhance your dining experience with this 5-Inch Glass Salt and Pepper Grinder Set from Figmint™. Made of glass and plastic, the condiment set includes two cylindrical containers with clear glass bodies and sage green tops engraved with "S" and "P," both designed with a grinder mechanism for effortlessly dispensing salt or pepper. Keep the set on your kitchen shelf or on the dining table for convenient access during meals.

Figmint™: Mixing up a taste of adventure every day.
